tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c (5.8%), suggesting prediabetes, and increased hemoglobin and hematocrit, which may indicate relative polycythemia or dehydration. Platelet mean and distribution width are also slightly elevated, possibly reflecting platelet activation or variation. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and white cell count, are within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Facharzt für Allgemeinmedizin Johann Holbach
